episodes.title: The untold stories behind PH biggest police operations with General Nicolas Torre III | The Spokes
episodes.description:
June 1, 2026 Episode

Get ready for thought-provoking conversations that challenge your views and sharpen your opinions.

Join Atty. Mike Toledo and Margaux Salcedo on #TheSpokes as they tackle both sides of today’s most pressing political and governance issues.

From growing up in Sulu as the son of a police officer and a teacher to becoming the first PNPA graduate to lead the Philippine National Police, General Nicolas Torre III has built a career defined by discipline, controversy, and public service. 

Now serving as General Manager of the Metropolitan Manila Development Authority, he joins us for a candid conversation about leadership, law enforcement, and life beyond the uniform.

In this exclusive interview, General Torre opens up about the Quiboloy operation, the arrest of former President Rodrigo Duterte, his brief tenure as PNP chief, his relationship with Senator Ronald dela Rosa, and his plans for Metro Manila. 

Watch until the end for the tough questions that everyone wants answered.

🕥 9:00 a.m., Mondays - Fridays

episodes.title: On Point: U.S. Seeks Extradition of Pastor Apollo Quiboloy
episodes.description:
August 21, 2025 Episode

Pinky Webb gets #OnPoint, where she asks the tough questions, tackles key issues, and clears the facts.

The United States is reportedly seeking the extradition of detained Pastor Apollo Quiboloy, who faces multiple criminal charges in the Philippines. Philippine Ambassador to the U.S., Jose Manuel Romualdez, confirms the request was made last June.

Quiboloy’s legal team emphasizes that Philippine courts should resolve his domestic cases first. 

Join us as we go on point with his legal counsel, Attorney Ferdinand Topacio, for the latest updates.

🕛 7:30 p.m., Mondays to Fridays
